testPlan: Verify the file set lands the three Home-tab read endpoints: app/api/medicines/search/route.ts, app/api/distributors/route.ts, app/api/offers/route.ts.
Verify each handler resolves the retailer via getSession() and returns 401 with { error: 'unauthenticated' } when the cookie is missing (defence in depth).
Verify each handler exports `dynamic = 'force-dynamic'` so Next 14 does not attempt static generation on cookie-aware routes.

Verify GET /api/medicines/search reads ?q from the URL (default empty), calls searchMedicines(q), maps each result through getDistributor to attach the {id, name} sub-object the search-results UI expects, and caps the response at 50 rows.
Verify GET /api/distributors returns the canonical UI projection (id, name, region, rating).
Verify GET /api/offers returns active offers (validUntil >= now, sortOrder ascending) with the distributor sub-object and validUntil ISO-formatted.
Verify the response shapes match the CTO contract exactly (no extra fields, no missing fields).
Search files[].content for forbidden placeholder strings.

results.test: File set covers the three Home-tab read endpoints.
results.details: 3 files declared at app/api/medicines/search/route.ts, app/api/distributors/route.ts, app/api/offers/route.ts. All Next 14 Route Handler convention paths.

results.test: 401 short-circuit on missing session cookie (3/3 handlers).
results.details: All three handlers call getSession() at the top and return NextResponse.json({ error: 'unauthenticated' }, { status: 401 }) when the result is null. Confirmed by tracing each route function head.

results.test: Force-dynamic export present in all 3 handlers.
results.details: Each file has `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'` immediately after the imports. Required because each handler reads cookies() via getSession().

Reads ?q via new URL(request.url).searchParams.get('q') ?? ''. Calls searchMedicines(q).slice(0, 50). Maps each row to { id, name, brand, genericName, distributor: { id, name }, mrpPaise, sellingPricePaise, scheme, packSize }. Falls back to 'Unknown distributor' if the distributor row is missing (defence-in-depth - in-memory invariant says this never happens). Co-located vitest covers (a) 401 unauthenticated, (b) empty q -> non-empty results with the right shape, (c) case-insensitive q filtering.
Returns { distributors: [{ id, name, region, rating }] } matching the CTO contract. listDistributors() already sorts by name.

Returns { offers: [{ id, title, description, bannerLabel, validUntil (ISO string), distributor: { id, name } }] }. listOffers() filters expired entries and sorts by sortOrder, so the UI carousel renders in the documented order without further work.

results.test: Response shapes match the CTO contract.
results.details: Cross-checked each handler's response object against the CTO apiContracts entries. medicines/search: matches (no extras). distributors: matches. offers: matches with the explicit ISO conversion for validUntil (Date is not JSON-serialisable as ISO without .toISOString()).
